_comment: Controlled vocabulary for value_journal.jsonl's 'type' field. Add a new type by adding an entry here — no code changes needed. 'other' always exists as an escape hatch; use the entry's notes field to explain when picking it.

qbr.label: QBR
qbr.description: Quarterly Business Review with Atlassian or a joint QBR involving a customer.

meeting.label: Meeting
meeting.description: General meeting or call with an Atlassian contact, customer, or ecosystem partner.

enablement.label: Enablement
enablement.description: Training, certification, or enablement session — given or received.

co_sell.label: Co-sell activity
co_sell.description: Joint selling activity with Atlassian, AWS, Google, or a GSI.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.description: Workshop or working session with a customer or Atlassian.

escalation_support.label: Escalation support
escalation_support.description: Supporting or resolving a customer or partner escalation.

marketplace_activity.label: Marketplace activity
marketplace_activity.description: Work on an Atlassian Marketplace app, listing, or submission.

deal_support.label: Deal support
deal_support.description: Direct support on a specific deal or opportunity.

program_admin.label: Program administration
program_admin.description: Partner program administration — registrations, renewals, compliance.

other.label: Other
other.description: Anything not covered above — explain in the notes field.
